scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:env
scripts.setup:env: bash -lc 'if [ ! -f backend/.env ]; then cp backend/.env.example backend/.env; echo "Created backend/.env from template."; else echo "backend/.env already exists."; fi'
scripts.dev:all: bash -lc 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & wait'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
